name: intercom
description: Reads and writes the full Intercom REST API 2.14 surface through bounded streams, direct reads, binary metadata policies, and approval-gated reverse ETL actions.

risk.read: external Intercom API reads can include customer, company, conversation, admin, support, and content data from the configured workspace
risk.write: Intercom reverse ETL actions can mutate customers, companies, conversations, help center content, tickets, tags, admin settings, exports, and other workspace resources
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan, preview, approval, execute; destructive/admin actions require typed confirmation before execution
